Text: The EBSD system baseline test performance time needs to be reduced from 100 seconds to 66 seconds.
Notes: Drove LA REQ-000156/A (90 sec target; allocated to EBSD + Control Subsystem + PCB SC100)

Text: The EBSD system needs to support USB-C to increase performance of data exchange and communication with devices under test.
Notes: Drove LA REQ-000152/A (USB-A) and REQ-000159/A (USB Connector V2.0); influenced REQ-000169/A (Fiber Optic RX/TX)

Text: The EBSD system product cost needs to be reduced by 10%.
Notes: Drove LA REQ-000165/A (Component Costs ≤ $1500) and REQ-000166/A (Per Unit Assembly Costs ≤ $500)
